'''Rana Mas Trehalt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], and a legendary [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] who was considered a benevolent ruler and a wise lawgiver. She ushered her people into a cultural [[Golden Age (Duros)|golden age]] by encouraging the exploration of various arts and sciences, particularly interstellar flight.<ref name="San">''{{GamerCite|2|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Duros}}''</ref> Her scientists made profound breakthroughs in this field and within decades they had established orbital [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] over Duro. Around [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]], the development of the modern [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] led to a wave of Duros colonization under Rana's blessing.<ref name=":0">[[The Essential Atlas|''The Essential Atlas'']]</ref> The Duros made first contact with many [[Species/Legends|species]], including [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. Rana befriended a [[Unidentified Corellian Princess|Corellian princess]] and received a ring from her as a gift.<ref name=":1">[[Mission from Mount Yoda|''Mission From Mount Yoda'']]</ref> Rana was also one of the [[Core Founder/Legends|founding members]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[25,053 BBY]].<ref name=":0" /> After she [[Death/Legends|died]] at the advanced age of two hundred, she was succeeded by her son, [[Dassid]], who continued his mother's policies of galactic expansion.<ref>[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons|''The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons'']]</ref> A [[Monument to Queen Rana|monument]] was later made to her in the [[Valley of Royalty]]. Rana was spoken of with great respect even into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Nearly every schoolchild on every civilized [[Planet/Legends|planet]] learned about Duro's ancient history and the Golden Age when Queen Rana ruled.<ref name=":1" /> 

Rana meant ''dark cloud'' in [[Durese/Legends|Durese]].
